titles.title: 彼女フェイス THE ANIMATION

data.title: Kanojo Face The Animation
data.title_japanese: 彼女フェイス THE ANIMATION
data.synopsis: Konishi, a high school student, and his girlfriend Sanae regularly attend drama club. The boy has long fallen for the beauty for her sincerity, hard work, and other feminine advantages, and they began dating. Weeks and months passed, and the relationship did not move a step. One day, while doing another rehearsal for a drama club, Sanae finds condoms in the guy's room. Konishi thought there might be trouble. However, the girl's face was already frozen in anticipation.

data.title: POPular UPrising
data.synopsis: Music video for the song POPular UPrising by Laputa.

data.title: Shinkai
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Shinkai by Laputa.

data.title: Elemon
data.synopsis:
Leo is a boy genius inventor. Aquro is a water type Elemon (H2O) created by Leo. Elemon are creatures born from the Elemon Blender. They are mysterious beings with the power of the elements! "ELEMON" opens up an exciting world of science and adventure, anchored by the friendship of Leo and Aquro as they explore an entire universe of unique Elemon!

(Source: Toei Animation)

titles.title: カヤちゃんはコワくない

data.title: Kaya-chan wa Kowakunai
data.title_japanese: カヤちゃんはコワくない
data.synopsis:
In a certain kindergarten, Satou Kaya is a notorious troublemaker—so much so that several of her teachers have already quit from the stress that comes with managing her. She constantly prevents other children from playing, reading their favorite books, or even going to the restroom—at least, that is what it looks like from the outside. When a new kindergarten teacher, Chie Hasumi, is assigned to Kaya, she discovers that Kaya actually protects other kids from evil spirits!

With this newfound knowledge, Chie places her trust in Kaya to keep the class safe. However, Chie soon realizes that, while Kaya protects her friends, there may be something at home Kaya herself needs protection from.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Isekai no Sata wa Shachiku Shidai
The Affairs of the Other World Depend on the Corporate Slave
異世界の沙汰は社畜次第
Isekai Office Worker: The Other World's Books Depend on the Bean Counter

data.title: Isekai no Sata wa Shachiku Shidai
data.title_english: Isekai Office Worker: The Other World's Books Depend on the Bean Counter
data.title_japanese: 異世界の沙汰は社畜次第
title_synonyms: The Affairs of the Other World Depend on the Corporate Slave
data.synopsis:
Overworked office employee Seiichirou Kondou would be fine spending the rest of his days in the same exhausting routine, but an unexpected act of heroism causes him to be sucked into a parallel world. His abductors, residents of the magic-filled Romany Kingdom, promise him a life of comfort as an apology for his accidental summoning. Unfazed, Kondou demands something that he thinks would suit him better: a job.

After witnessing the incompetence of his new colleagues in the Royal Accounting Department, Kondou's workaholic instincts kick in, and he takes it upon himself to save the kingdom from complete bankruptcy. But this new world proves detrimental to Kondou. When the young and dashing captain of the Third Royal Order, Sir Aresh Indolark, saves Kondou's life, the two become something more than acquaintances. Though Kondou and Aresh initially struggle to convey their clashing values to each other, they slowly realize that this meeting will not only change their own lives but also the kingdom as a whole.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Pokantotan
data.synopsis:
Pokantotan is a slightly forgetful rabbit who is missing something.

(Source: San-X Official Site; translated)

titles.title: Kidou Senshi Gundam SEED Freedom Zero
機動戦士ガンダムSEED FREEDOM ZERO
Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom Zero

data.title: Kidou Senshi Gundam SEED Freedom Zero
data.title_english: Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom Zero
data.title_japanese: 機動戦士ガンダムSEED FREEDOM ZERO
data.synopsis: Prequel project for Kidou Senshi Gundam SEED Freedom.

data.title: Wanko to Piroshi
data.synopsis:
Introducing a dog with a gaping hole in the heart! The slightly sad and warm daily life with the solitary chick "Piroshi" may gently and firmly snuggle into your heart...

(Source: San-X Official Site; translated)

data.title: Katakoi Meteor Shower
data.synopsis:
Katakoi Meteor Shower. It is a shooting star whose unrequited love will come true if you wish for it. Seira hoped that she would fall in love with Hikaru from the class next door, but she ended up turning into a cat. It looks like Hikaru has also turned into a cat...? What will happen to the two of them in the future?

(Source: San-X Official Site; translated)

data.title: Wanjie Zhuzai
data.synopsis:
The protagonist, Lin Feng, was originally a genius robotics engineer. To enhance the capabilities of his super-powered robot, he painstakingly unearthed a mysterious ancient treasure from the abyss—the Eye of the Ancestral Dragon. Just as he was about to transfer the Eye's energy into his robot, the divine power within was accidentally activated, triggering a spacetime vortex that transported Lin Feng to an ancient god-like continent that revered martial arts, where he was reborn. 

The reborn Lin Feng had his memories of his past life sealed, becoming an ordinary person who only awakened a healing-type martial soul. He faced cold shoulders and even had his fiancee break off their engagement. His fiancee's clan, determined to eliminate any future threats, ruthlessly attacked and killed him. In this moment of crisis, Lin Feng awakened his memories of the Eye of the Ancestral Dragon and was overjoyed to discover that its divine power had successfully fused with his super-powered robot. Subsequently, with the robot's assistance, he gradually mastered the Eye of the Ancestral Dragon's power and embarked on the path to becoming a powerful figure.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

data.title: Wu Ni
data.synopsis: On the Tianwu Continent, the powerful dominated the weak. Feng Hao, the young master of the Feng family, possessed a rare physique but was wrongly labeled as talentless and worthless. As a result, he was frequently mocked and belittled. However, a fateful encounter altered the course of his life and destiny. Through an extraordinary process, he infused his body with rare gemstones, eventually attaining unmatched strength. This transformation set him on a journey to master the void and explore the far reaches of the universe.
data.background: Adaptation of Zhishi Xiao Xiami's (只是小虾米) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Yiqing Qijian de Feitian Gou
data.synopsis:
During the epidemic, Mr. Blue is a tricycle driver, usually to solicit for a living, one day received a passenger, from the space company to the hospital, on the way to hear that the passenger said that the space company were all infected with the virus, all went to the hospital, she was the last person to leave the lock the door, after the hospital passengers do not have masks, may not be allowed to enter the hospital, Mr. Blue gave her his mask, on the way back to meet the picket did not let the people without masks through, so Mr. Blue, there is no way to escape when he fled to the space company, and the rocket opened to the sky.

(Source: Golden Horse)

titles.title: Drowning Dogs During the COVID-19 Pandemic

data.title: Yiqing Qijian de Luoshuigou
data.title_english: Drowning Dogs During the COVID-19 Pandemic
data.synopsis:
During the covid-19 pandemic, everyone was kept at home and quarantined, The red granny only play with her dog Miaomiao, one day，the dog was lost.It turned out that the authorities thought pets also carried the virus, so they organized dog hunting teams to catch stray dogs, They happen to meet the dog Miaomiao and capture its. The red granny decides to rescue miaomiao. On the way, they meet Huang Xiaomei, who has also come to rescue the dogs.They rescued all the dogs together, But the city won't let them go back, Turned them away as carriers of the virus,So they drifted on to the fabled Island of Liberty, where there were no viruses or quarantines,Can they reach their destination after all this trouble?

(Source: Golden Horse)

data.title: He Zhong Zhi Hai
data.synopsis:
22 receives an invitation from a game company to participate in a trial of their virtual reality game, The Sea in a Box. In the game world, a fishing village on the southern coast is where villagers bring their household deities to the streets for a "deity procession" to celebrate the Lantern Festival. 

22 and three other test players discover a female deity they've never seen before, "Cizhou Shenggu" (Sacred Maiden Cizhou). As they delve deeper into Cizhou Shenggu's origins, they gradually discover traces of manipulation from outside the game, a mysterious force subtly influencing the NPCs within. 

Meanwhile, 22's sister, 33, also discovers suspicious behavior from the employees outside the game. A scheming company, NPC fishermen secretly planning a mysterious ritual, and seemingly secretive companions—a vast conspiracy involving multiple forces gradually surfaces.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Benghuai: Xing Qiong Tiedao - Yinhe Renfa Tie Luan Wu Qu Mo Poxie Zhan Yue Zhi Juan
《崩坏：星穹铁道》动画短片：「银河忍法帖•乱武驱魔破邪斩月之卷」
Honkai: Star Rail - Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions — Havoc Exorcism: Lunar Vileslayer Scroll

data.title: Benghuai: Xing Qiong Tiedao - Yinhe Renfa Tie Luan Wu Qu Mo Poxie Zhan Yue Zhi Juan
data.title_english: Honkai: Star Rail - Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions — Havoc Exorcism: Lunar Vileslayer Scroll
data.title_japanese: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》动画短片：「银河忍法帖•乱武驱魔破邪斩月之卷」
data.synopsis:
The vast expanse of the boundless silver sea conceals countless fiendlings beneath its surface. Border villages fall under the onslaught of these fiendlings, and even the once-bright moon above has turned into a tyrant.

"Whomst defends the world's justice? Whomst sees through the deceit of vice and indulgence? Whomst will wipe out these evildoers? Whomst will protect the light of ten thousand homes?"

The weak are silenced by sinister laughter, leaving only a sorrowful sigh. But when the people raise their heads to the sky, the falling stars beyond the heavens have already answered—

A dazzling blaze of otherworldly fire will soon obliterate the calamities of this realm. This is the divine retribution of the Mappou Age of the Dharma, delivered by the Ninja Heroes patrolling the sea of stars.

(Source: YouTube)

data.title: Shanhai Fu Mo Lu
data.synopsis:
A civilization that disappeared in the dust, the ancient bosses sought their own way to become emperors. Jiang Hao, a modern young man who was originally a chess piece, stepped into the prehistoric wilderness in order to find the whereabouts of his father. With his incomplete "power bank" totem, he fought with people, from primitive tribes to the mysterious ancient city, he fought his way out; he fought with the earth, crossed the wilderness, hunted ancient beasts, and learned the ancient and mysterious totem witchcraft from the beasts; he fought with the sky, and the magic light from the sky suddenly appeared, wanting to devour this magnificent six wastelands. He went upstream, ignited himself, turned into the sun, and fought with the devil! He was shaking the world, but he didn't know that the shackles of fate had already trapped him, and his father's smile was still lingering.

(Source: Youku, translated)

titles.title: The Strongest Sect of All Ages

data.title: Wangu Zui Qiang Zong
data.title_english: The Strongest Sect of All Ages
data.synopsis:
A special scientific experiment, a wonderful adventure in different time and space. Jun Changxiao came to Xingyun Continent with the system and inherited an unknown small sect. He must build the sect into the No. 1 in Xingyun Continent within a hundred years, and recruit 100,000 disciples. If he fails to complete it, the system will explode and he will be finished. In order to survive and return to the original time and space safely. He actively "established a sect" and taught disciples. The gang grew from a "lone commander" to a hundred people. Under the leadership of Jun Changxiao, everyone built houses and planted crops, caught chickens and found dogs, and maintained peace and helped the weak anytime and anywhere. The disciples in the sect have different personalities. The funny Jun Changxiao gets along well with everyone, and there is unlimited joy in the warm big family. In a lively and positive atmosphere, everyone supports each other and grows rapidly. The cultivation of the sect is a long and arduous task, and Jun Changxiao leads the disciples to explore up and down...

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: 回レ！雪月花 pixel art version

data.title: Maware! Setsugetsuka Pixel Art Version
data.title_japanese: 回レ！雪月花 pixel art version
data.synopsis: A pixel art version of the Maware! Setsugetsuka ED from Machine-Doll wa Kizutsukanai. It was included with the sixth Blu-ray and DVD volumes of the series and never aired on TV.

titles.title: Isekai Munchkin: HP1 no Mama de Saikyou Saisoku Dungeon Kouryaku
Another World Munchkin: Conquering the Dungeon as the Strongest and the Fastest with Only 1 HP
異世界マンチキン　ーHP1のままで最強最速ダンジョン攻略ー
Otherworldly Munchkin: Let's Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!

data.title: Isekai Munchkin: HP1 no Mama de Saikyou Saisoku Dungeon Kouryaku
data.title_english: Otherworldly Munchkin: Let's Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!
data.title_japanese: 異世界マンチキン　ーHP1のままで最強最速ダンジョン攻略ー
title_synonyms: Another World Munchkin: Conquering the Dungeon as the Strongest and the Fastest with Only 1 HP
data.synopsis:
16-year-old Yukito Kirihara lives with his 14-year-old sister Sana, who he treasures more than anyone else. But when an ogre shows up outside of his window looking for Sana (a shocking event in its own right), Yukito leaps to save her—and is killed. He's offered the promise of reincarnation by a mysterious woman, who gives him a character sheet in a mysterious book. But when Yukito sees Sana in there, too, he sets off to find her, and save them both—even if he only has 1 hp with which to do it!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

data.title: Yano-kun no Futsuu no Hibi
data.synopsis:
For as long as he can remember, the klutzy Tsuyoshi Yano has been prone to injury. Constantly showing up to school with fresh scrapes and bruises, he has long become accustomed to the pain and to the sight of his face covered in bandages. However, Yano's days begin to change for the better when he is transferred to a new class and meets Kiyoko Yoshida, the class president known for her reliability and kindheartedness.

Through Yoshida's efforts to learn more about him, Yano starts to experience the kind of high school life he has always wished for—one filled with laughter and camaraderie. Between casual conversations and countless small accidents, the two gradually grow closer, and their relationship may bloom into something more than just friendship.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Arne no Jikenbo
data.synopsis:
In the shadowy streets of Lügenberg—a city where humans and demihumans coexist in uneasy peace—an unusual detective agency operates far beyond the reach of common law. There, vampire investigator Arne Neuntöte pursues the uncanny, blurring the lines between violence and truth.

Everything begins to shift when Lynn Reinweiß, a noblewoman whose fascination with vampires outweighs her grasp of their danger, crosses paths with Arne. The two form an alliance in pursuit of bloody mysteries that emerge from Lügenberg's darkest corners as death and deception surface beneath the city's gothic veneer. Through each case they solve, Arne and Lynn discover time and again that truth is more elusive than what any surface can reveal.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Arne no Jikenbo is based off the RPG Maker game of the same name.

data.title: Biaozhun Guige Zhanshi
data.synopsis:
A nonsensical, hilarious animated film! There's a boy with the magical ability to cure all diseases, but his method of healing is by hitting people. There's also a girl who seems physically weak, but can suddenly develop explosive muscles, creating an adorable contrast. And then there's a monster who dreams of becoming the strongest. This quirky trio embarks on a magical journey full of surprises. It's guaranteed to make you laugh until your abs and V-line are aching!

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Oh Sot's (오솟) Korean webtoon, Standard Specification Transcription (표준규격전사).

titles.title: ホテル・インヒューマンズ

data.title: Hotel Inhumans
data.title_japanese: ホテル・インヒューマンズ
data.synopsis:
Ikurou Hoshi and Sara Haizaki are the concierges at Hotel Inhumans, a hotel that specifically caters to assassins. They fulfill all the requests their guests may ask of them, never uttering the word "no." While Ikurou specializes in research into their clients' backgrounds and careers, Sara protects the hotel with skills to match that of the hotel's patrons.

However, despite providing every service imaginable for these assassins, Ikurou despises those who kill for money and claims daily that he is going to quit his job. Yet the more requests he and Sara fulfill on behalf of their guests, the more Ikurou learns about the unexpected humanity found within the assassins. With every glimpse into the lives and motivations of those who murder for a living, the more he realizes assassins are not so different from him or Sara.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
